tasks.label: Set up project (macOS/Linux)
tasks.command: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

tasks.label: Set up project (Windows)
tasks.command: py -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
